name: io.github.untitledfinancial/dpx
title: DPX ‚Äî Institutional Cross-Border Settlement
description: AI-native intelligence oracle and institutional settlement rail. 10+ layer Stability Oracle (climate, macro, FX, ESG, supply chain, earth systems) with x402 pay-per-call data API. Cross-border settlement at 1.385% all-in via Base mainnet. GENIUS Act + MiCA + Basel III compliant.

environmentVariables.name: STABILITY_ORACLE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Stability Oracle URL (default: https://stability.untitledfinancial.com)

environmentVariables.name: SETTLEMENT_AGENT_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Settlement Agent URL (default: https://agent.untitledfinancial.com)

environmentVariables.name: SANDBOX_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'false' for live on-chain settlement (default: true)
